name: Date-Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not pack the dry ingredients together. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except for the applesauce.
2. Add the applesauce and beat to blend thoroughly.
3. Grease the bottom of a 9 by 5 by 3-inch loaf pan with shortening.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 50 minutes.
6. Allow the bread to stand for approximately 10 minutes before turning it out onto a rack to cool.
12 hours of storage will improve the flavor and texture.
